---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature, keybinding, or workflow improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve

Describe the workflow or moment where agx falls short today. Concrete
example beats abstract description.

## What you'd like to see

What agx should do differently. A specific keybinding, flag, output, or
TUI element is more actionable than "support X better".

## Alternatives you considered

Especially: have you checked ROADMAP.md? Some features are already planned.
If yours fits an existing phase, link it — that's useful prioritization
input even if you don't open the PR.

## Anything else
